CustomField.description: Semicolon-separated list of Contact Record Type names to exclude from automatic Household object creation. Contacts with these Record Types will not have a Household record created for them. Only applies to the legacy One-to-One and Individual Account models; ignored when using the Household Account model.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Contact Record Types to exclude from automatic Household creation. Only applies to One-to-One or Individual Account models; ignored for Household Accounts.
CustomField.label: Household Creation Excluded Record Types
